Status ● Open to work

I'm a final-year Information Technology undergraduate at SLIIT, building things that matter — from full-stack MERN apps to polyglot AI-powered microservices platforms.

My current side project, Vettly, is an AI recruitment platform spanning ASP.NET Core, Go, Python FastAPI, and React Native. I care about clean architecture, readable code, and shipping things that actually work.

I have experience across web, mobile, and backend development, and I'm always looking for the next challenging problem to solve.
